error_signature: Callback verification failed with the following errors: curl_errno = 35
title: WhatsApp Trigger Callback Verification Failed
symptom: When trying to run the WhatsApp Trigger node, n8n throws a callback verification error related to SSL. The error indicates a problem with the SSL certificate during webhook validation.
applies_when: Self-hosted n8n on VPS with self-signed SSL
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or context
root_cause: The error occurs because the self-signed SSL certificate used by the n8n instance is not accepted by Meta during the webhook validation process. This leads to SSL-related errors when attempting to establish a secure connection.
fix_steps: Connect to your server via SSH.
Create a symbolic link for certbot with 'ln -s /snap/bin/certbot /usr/bin/certbot'.
Stop Traefik to free port 80 using 'docker ps' and 'docker stop <traefik_container>'.
Run certbot to generate a valid SSL certificate with 'certbot certonly --standalone -d your_domain'.
agent_instruction: Install a valid SSL certificate using certbot to resolve the callback verification issue.
